falsification_conditions.condition: The price increases by more than 10% over the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern similarity to a historical bottom and suggest a blowoff top rather than a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The similarity to the bottom_2024_aug pattern drops below 70% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the current assumption that the market is following a historical bottom trajectory.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score decreases below 20 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in blowoff score would indicate reduced momentum or volatility, contradicting the current high blowoff score of 39 and undermining the validity of the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
